entries.name: Sobble
entries.label: Community Day — Saturday — Normal
entries.source_text: Sobble Community Day Community Day Starts: Saturday, July 4, 2026, at 2:00 PM Local Time Ends: Saturday, July 4, 2026, at 5:00 PM Local Time

entries.name: Sobble
entries.label: Incense — Saturday — Shiny
entries.source_text: Shiny Sobble will be available! Trainers will have an increased chance of encountering Shiny Sobble during Community Day.

entries.name: Sobble
entries.label: Lure Encounters — Saturday — Normal
entries.source_text: From 2:00 p.m. to 9:00 p.m. local time , Sobble will have a very high chance of appearing at PokeStops with active regular Lure Modules.

entries.name: Sobble
entries.label: Lure Encounters — Saturday — Shiny
entries.source_text: Sobble attracted to regular Lure Modules will still have an increased chance to be Shiny and may have a Special Background. That's more chances to encounter the featured Pokemon even after the event hours!

entries.name: Sobble
entries.label: Raids — Saturday — Normal
entries.source_text: Take a few snapshots during Community Day for a surprise! During the event you can snap an AR Photo and get photobombed by Sobble.

entries.name: Sobble
entries.label: Field Research — Saturday — Normal
entries.source_text: July Community Day—themed Field Research will be available! Catch Sobble to earn rewards such as Stardust, Ultra Balls, additional encounters with Sobble, and more! You may even find Field Research that leads to encounters with Sobble that have a Special Background—if you're lucky!

entries.name: Sobble
entries.label: Field Research — Saturday — Shiny
entries.source_text: July Community Day—themed Field Research will be available! Catch Sobble to earn rewards such as Stardust, Ultra Balls, additional encounters with Sobble, and more! You may even find Field Research that leads to encounters with Sobble that have a Special Background—if you're lucky!

entries.name: Sobble
entries.label: Special Research — Saturday — Normal
entries.source_text: 3 encounters with Sobble that have a Special Background (at the end of each page)

entries.name: Sobble
entries.label: Wild Encounters — Saturday — Normal
entries.source_text: Sobble will appear more frequently in the wild.

entries.name: Sobble
entries.label: Wild Encounters — Saturday — Shiny
entries.source_text: Sobble will appear more frequently in the wild.
